item.label: Extend tm_batch_update to support multi-item operations
item.summary: Extend tm_batch_update(id, operations) to also accept multi-item format with backward compatibility

body:
# Description

Cancelled with `spec-008` after the owning request record was removed. Recreate this task under a new request if multi-item batch update work is resumed.

# Acceptance Criteria

Cancelled with parent specification.

# Notes

This task was never fleshed into implementation-ready detail before the request chain disappeared.
